headline: This Is How The Sherwin-Williams Company (SHW) Is Positioned for Breakout Growth
summary: The Sherwin-Williams Company (NYSE:SHW) is one of the stocks positioned for breakout growth. On March 17, Argus reiterated that The Sherwin-Williams Company (NYSE:SHW) is a Buy, impressed by the company’s leadership role in the manufacture, distribution, and sale of paint coatings and other related products. However, it cut its price target to $355 from $375. […]

headline: Sherwin-Williams (SHW) Q1 Earnings on the Horizon: Analysts' Insights on Key Performance Measures
summary: Get a deeper insight into the potential performance of Sherwin-Williams (SHW) for the quarter ended March 2026 by going beyond Wall Street's top-and-bottom-line estimates and examining the estimates for some of its key metrics.

headline: Sherwin-Williams (SHW) Valuation Check After Recent Trading Uptick And Mixed Return Profile
summary: Sherwin-Williams stock snapshot after recent trading move Sherwin-Williams (SHW) is back in focus after a recent uptick in trading, with shares last closing at $337.66. Short term returns show mixed moves, which may prompt investors to revisit the paint maker’s fundamentals. See our latest analysis for Sherwin-Williams. The recent 1 month share price return of 7.64% comes after a softer 90 day period. The 1 year total shareholder return of 1.86% sits against a much stronger 3 year total...

headline: 1 Profitable Stock for Long-Term Investors and 2 We Ignore
summary: While profitability is essential, it doesn’t guarantee long-term success. Some companies that rest on their margins will lose ground as competition intensifies - as Jeff Bezos said, "Your margin is my opportunity".
